summary: Frontend testing of Accounting Module for ZAMOTOMOTO TV. All 10 test items passed. Login works, Accounting link appears in sidebar under ADMIN section with ∑ icon, /accounting renders ACCOUNTING DASHBOARD heading with 4 summary cards (Total Expenses, Total Credits, Pending Review, Total Assets), empty state 'No entries found' shows correctly (DB tables not migrated yet), filter bar with ALL/DEBIT/CREDIT toggles and status/category dropdowns visible, admin redirected from /accounting/workspace to /accounting, and no regression on dashboard/tasks/special-projects.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting module fully implemented and working. DB tables (accounting_entries, accounting_categories, accounting_documents) not yet migrated in Supabase — pages show empty state correctly. Run /app/frontend/supabase/migrations/20260402_accounting_module.sql to enable real data. Accountant role flow (/accounting/workspace) not tested as accountant user requires DB migration first.

test_results.2_accounting_sidebar_link: PASS - visible under ADMIN section with ∑ icon
test_results.4_summary_cards: PASS - all 4 cards visible with values
test_results.5_filter_bar: PASS - ALL/DEBIT/CREDIT toggles + status + category dropdowns
